prompt: Character model sheet style, historical painterly realism for a children's picture book. Same single character repeated in different portrait views with consistent identity: young colonial soldier approximately 16-18 years old, slim build, narrow jaw, soft youthful cheeks, anxious but steady eyes, medium-small straight nose, natural lips, short brown hair mostly hidden under a worn tricorn hat, clean-shaven, vulnerable but brave expression. Off-white/gray linen-wool shirt and brown leather shoulder strap, no weapon focus. Neutral dark painterly background, clear face visibility, consistency across all variations, emotionally readable. Avoid older adult look or heroic square jaw.
